commits.subject: Day 105 (03:53): Add regex-error recovery hint to search tool error messages (Task 3)

eval.reason: The implementation adds regex-error detection (checking stderr for "unmatched", "invalid", "regex parse", "unclosed", "empty pattern", "repetition" when `regex=true`) and appends the recovery hint exactly as specified. Two focused tests are added — one verifies the hint appears for a regex error (unclosed `[`), the other verifies the hint is absent for non-regex errors. Both tests pass.

task_file_title: Add regex-error recovery hint to search tool error messages
